result.preview:
"SQLite query execution error (DatabaseError): Execution failed on sql 'SELECT o.OwnerId AS AgentId, SUM(oi.Quantity * oi.UnitPrice) AS SalesAmount
FROM "Order" o
JOIN OrderItem oi ON o.Id = oi.OrderId
JOIN sales_pipeline.Opportunity opp ON opp.AccountId = o.AccountId
JOIN sales_pipeline.Contract c ON c.Id = opp.ContractID__c
WHERE c.CompanySignedDate >= '2022-06-25' AND c.CompanySignedDate < '2022-11-26'
GROUP BY o.OwnerId
ORDER BY SalesAmount DESC
LIMIT 10;': no such table: sales_pipeline.Opportunity"

args.query:
SELECT o.OwnerId AS AgentId, SUM(oi.Quantity * oi.UnitPrice) AS SalesAmount
FROM "Order" o
JOIN OrderItem oi ON o.Id = oi.OrderId
JOIN sales_pipeline.Opportunity opp ON opp.AccountId = o.AccountId
JOIN sales_pipeline.Contract c ON c.Id = opp.ContractID__c
WHERE c.CompanySignedDate >= '2022-06-25' AND c.CompanySignedDate < '2022-11-26'
GROUP BY o.OwnerId
ORDER BY SalesAmount DESC
LIMIT 10;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT o.OwnerId AS AgentId, SUM(oi.Quantity * oi.UnitPrice) AS SalesAmount
FROM "Order" o
JOIN OrderItem oi ON o.Id = oi.OrderId
JOIN sales_pipeline.Opportunity opp ON opp.AccountId = o.AccountId
JOIN sales_pipeline.Contract c ON c.Id = opp.ContractID__c
WHERE c.CompanySignedDate >= '2022-06-25' AND c.CompanySignedDate < '2022-11-26'
GROUP BY o.OwnerId
ORDER BY SalesAmount DESC
LIMIT 10;

args.query:
SELECT o.OwnerId AS AgentId, SUM(oi.Quantity * oi.UnitPrice) AS SalesAmount
FROM Opportunity o
JOIN OpportunityLineItem oi ON o.Id = oi.OpportunityId
JOIN Contract c ON c.Id = o.ContractID__c
WHERE c.CompanySignedDate >= '2022-06-25' AND c.CompanySignedDate < '2022-11-26'
GROUP BY o.OwnerId
ORDER BY SalesAmount DESC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
SELECT o.OwnerId AS AgentId, SUM(oi.TotalPrice) AS SalesAmount
FROM Opportunity o
JOIN OpportunityLineItem oi ON o.Id = oi.OpportunityId
JOIN Contract c ON c.Id = o.ContractID__c
WHERE c.CompanySignedDate >= '2022-06-25' AND c.CompanySignedDate < '2022-11-26'
GROUP BY o.OwnerId
ORDER BY SalesAmount DESC
LIMIT 1;

JOIN Contract c ON c.Id = o.ContractID__c

args.query:
SELECT o.OwnerId AS AgentId, SUM(CAST(oi.TotalPrice AS DOUBLE)) AS SalesAmount
FROM Opportunity o
JOIN OpportunityLineItem oi ON o.Id = oi.OpportunityId
JOIN Contract c ON c.Id = o.ContractID__c
WHERE c.CompanySignedDate >= '2022-06-25' AND c.CompanySignedDate < '2022-11-26'
GROUP BY o.OwnerId
ORDER BY SalesAmount DESC
LIMIT 1;
